text.title: AI-Assisted Persona Building (Two-Pass) Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output report.

input.description: Interview transcripts + Survey results + Analytics segments + Stakeholder reviewer list

trace.step: Normalise into snippet records with id + source + text.
Sonnet pass clusters into broad segments.
Haiku pass refines each cluster with quote grounding + goals.
Route to ≥3 stakeholders; collect verdicts + comments.
